title: onobrychis conferta
intro: Onobrychis conferta, also known as spreading sainfoin, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis conferta include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as a natural antihistamine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
